key.name: stations
key.description: List of (StopPoint id, display name) pairs to show departure boards for. Each station gets its own section in the popup.

key.name: station-id
key.description: Deprecated single-station id, kept only to migrate older installs into the 'stations' list.

key.name: station-name
key.summary: Display name for the configured station (legacy)
key.description: Deprecated single-station name, kept only to migrate older installs into the 'stations' list.

key.name: app-key
key.description: Optional TfL Unified API app key. The API works without one for low volumes, but a key gives higher rate limits.

key.name: max-departures
key.summary: Maximum number of departures to show
key.description: How many upcoming departures to list in the board.

key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to refresh the board while the menu is open.
